name: ai-mobile
description: Token-efficient Codex resource orchestration across bounded Codex CLI, Claude Code, Antigravity, and optional Cursor workers on Windows.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex work with local AI workers without orchestration waste.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile adds a compact capacity-aware worker layer to the current Codex task on Windows. Codex preserves the complete project outcome, executes the critical path, advances through dependency-ready milestones, and delegates independent bounded work to authenticated Codex CLI, Claude Code, explicitly authorized Antigravity, and optional headless Cursor workers. Normal operation uses one passive inventory, immediate background dispatch, one compact result read, deterministic verification, and at most one justified failover. It creates no manager loop, Goal, heartbeat, schedule, or desktop popup by default.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Mobile to drive this project to its complete verified outcome, advancing through dependency-ready milestones
Show the compact AI Mobile resource inventory
Use available capacity for independent bounded work while Codex advances the critical path
